name: openclaw-backup-r2
summary: Complete, encrypted, off-site backup of your OpenClaw setup to Cloudflare R2 via restic. Never lose your agents and config again.
description: Automated daily backup of your entire OpenClaw install (config, credentials, agents, workspace, cron) to Cloudflare R2 using restic. End-to-end encrypted client-side, deduplicated, off-site, with smart retention (7 daily + 4 weekly + 6 monthly) and a portable restore that works on any PC. Born from the pain of a doctor --fix wiping agents and config. Privacy note: this uploads your OpenClaw secrets (credentials/auth profiles) to your own third-party R2 bucket; encryption depends entirely on the strength and safekeeping of your restic password, and the real restore OVERWRITES the live .openclaw install (run test-restore first).
author: servicosmkt
triggers: openclaw doctor fix broke my setup
